title: calophyllum rufinerve
intro: Calophyllum rufinerve, also known as the Red Beaked Calophyllum, is a species of tree that belongs to the family Calophyllaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum rufinerve include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as oils, tinctures, and ointments to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
